title: Add unicode-normalization to relay/Cargo.toml
description: Why: canonicalize_display_name needs explicit dep even though it's transitive. What: add unicode-normalization = '0.1' to [dependencies] in relay/Cargo.toml. Verify it builds.
acceptance_criteria: cargo build -p nie-relay succeeds after adding dep
close_reason: unicode-normalization added to relay/Cargo.toml; build clean
